name: kbd
visual_summary: The kbd component is a visually distinct, interactive text block used to highlight keyboard input or shortcuts. It is a rectangular box with a clear background color, displaying text in a neutral color. Typically used in documentation or tutorials to indicate keyboard commands.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: kbd
Description: The kbd component is a visually distinct, interactive text block used to highlight keyboard input or shortcuts. It is a rectangular box with a clear background color, displaying text in a neutral color. Typically used in documentation or tutorials to indicate keyboard commands.
Style: minimal
Interactions: clickable
Tags: input, keyboard, tutorial

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
